parameters.jsCode:
// Generate HTML report for Gotenberg PDF conversion const data = $input.first().json; // Extract only what we need (exclude raw_results to reduce payload size) const { raw_results, ...reportData } = data; const incomplete_note = data.status !== 'Completed' ? '
Note: This simulation did not complete within the allocated time. Results shown are partial and may not represent steady-state conditions.
' : ''; // Generate full HTML report const htmlReport = ` Wastewater Simulation Report - ${data.job_id}

Wastewater Treatment Simulation Report

Generated: ${new Date(data.report_date).toLocaleString()}

Job ID: ${data.job_id}

Template: ${data.template}

Status: ${data.status}

Elapsed Time: ${data.elapsed_seconds} seconds

${incomplete_note}

Executive Summary

Simulation ${data.status.toLowerCase()} using the ${data.template} template.

Overall Assessment: ${data.assessment}

Influent Characteristics

ParameterValueUnitTypical Range
Flow${data.influent.flow_m3_d}m3/d-
COD${data.influent.COD_mg_L}mg/L300-600
TSS${data.influent.TSS_mg_L}mg/L200-400
NH4-N${data.influent.NH4_mg_L}mg/L25-50
Total P${data.influent.TP_mg_L}mg/L6-12
Temperature${data.influent.temperature_C}C15-25

Treatment System Configuration

ParameterValue
Template${data.template}
Reactor Type${data.reactor.type}
Total Volume${data.reactor.V_total_m3} m3
HRT${data.reactor.HRT_hours} hours
SRT${data.reactor.SRT_days} days
Aerobic DO${data.reactor.DO_aerobic} mg/L

Effluent Quality

ParameterInfluentEffluentRemoval %
COD${data.influent.COD_mg_L} mg/L${data.effluent.COD_mg_L} mg/L${data.removal.COD_pct}%
TSS${data.influent.TSS_mg_L} mg/L${data.effluent.TSS_mg_L} mg/L${data.removal.TSS_pct}%
NH4-N${data.influent.NH4_mg_L} mg/L${data.effluent.NH4_mg_L} mg/L${data.removal.NH4_pct}%
TN--${data.removal.TN_pct}%
TP${data.influent.TP_mg_L} mg/L${data.effluent.PO4_mg_L} mg/L${data.removal.TP_pct}%

Process Performance Analysis

Nitrification

Nitrification efficiency: ${data.nitrification_pct}%

Denitrification

Denitrification efficiency: ${data.denitrification_pct}%

Technical Notes

  • Timeout Setting: ${data.timeout_setting} seconds
  • Actual Runtime: ${data.elapsed_seconds} seconds
  • Server Version: ${data.server_version}

Report generated by QSDsan Wastewater Simulation Engine v1.0

`; return { json: { ...reportData, report_html: htmlReport, report_filename: `wastewater_simulation_${data.job_id}.pdf` } };

nodes.name: Upload PDF to Supabase
nodes.notes: Upload PDF to Supabase Storage (HTTP Request for proper binary handling)

parameters.jsCode:
// Generate CSV data from report
const data = $input.first().json;

// Build CSV content
const csvRows = [
  ['Parameter', 'Value'],
  ['Job ID', data.job_id],
  ['Report Date', data.report_date],
  ['Template', data.template],
  ['Status', data.status],
  ['Elapsed Seconds', data.elapsed_seconds],
  ['Assessment', data.assessment],
  ['', ''],
  ['INFLUENT', ''],
  ['Flow (m3/d)', data.influent.flow_m3_d],
  ['COD (mg/L)', data.influent.COD_mg_L],
  ['TSS (mg/L)', data.influent.TSS_mg_L],
  ['NH4-N (mg/L)', data.influent.NH4_mg_L],
  ['TP (mg/L)', data.influent.TP_mg_L],
  ['Temperature (C)', data.influent.temperature_C],
  ['', ''],
  ['EFFLUENT', ''],
  ['COD (mg/L)', data.effluent.COD_mg_L],
  ['TSS (mg/L)', data.effluent.TSS_mg_L],
  ['NH4-N (mg/L)', data.effluent.NH4_mg_L],
  ['NO3-N (mg/L)', data.effluent.NO3_mg_L],
  ['PO4-P (mg/L)', data.effluent.PO4_mg_L],
  ['', ''],
  ['REMOVAL (%)', ''],
  ['COD', data.removal.COD_pct],
  ['TSS', data.removal.TSS_pct],
  ['NH4', data.removal.NH4_pct],
  ['TN', data.removal.TN_pct],
  ['TP', data.removal.TP_pct],
  ['', ''],
  ['PERFORMANCE', ''],
  ['Nitrification (%)', data.nitrification_pct],
  ['Denitrification (%)', data.denitrification_pct],
  ['', ''],
  ['REACTOR', ''],
  ['Type', data.reactor.type],
  ['Volume (m3)', data.reactor.V_total_m3],
  ['HRT (hours)', data.reactor.HRT_hours],
  ['SRT (days)', data.reactor.SRT_days],
  ['DO Aerobic (mg/L)', data.reactor.DO_aerobic]
];

const csvContent = csvRows.map(row => row.join(',')).join('\n');

return {
  json: {
    job_id: data.job_id,
    csv_content: csvContent
  }
};
